raw_text: Gives quick delivery and everything. convenient yes, but it's very difficult to cancel order if accidentally placed extra quantity and then they charge extra cancellation charges afterwards with account block. Recently i wanted to order 1 500ml milk packet , upon trying to see total charges that is being charged the order got placed accidentally of 2 packets. And then I was unable to cancel it. At the end I had to pay extra. Very bad experience.

Awful experience while exchanging am item , the product size was not mentioned on the app and it said that 72hours replacement but when I tried to exchange the item the chatbot simply says "sorry we can't", even after that I emailed the issue to blinkit and they replied the same way,why put the 72hours replacement when you can't keep your promise, also there is no contact number so I am stuck with the chat assistant with same replies.

it's a useful app but not as much as amazon or instamart. It's good only for ordering daily need products like bread milk. don't order any electronic or beauty or any other appliances for here as if any product has a problem they are not going to return or replace the product and instead ask you to connect to the company of the product. The customer support is not good. Amazon is far better.

dont use this app or order any electronic item. they will give you empty box or used item. when you complaint to the customer care you will not find any solution. be aware of them dont waste your hard money to use blinkit. zepto is much better as comprassion of them they provide you soltuion with in few minutes i recently scammed in boat airdopes the cost was 1000 rs.

Worst app ever experienced. The product which was delivered was not up to the mark and when I raised the complaint to the customer support, they refused to replace it with another size and revised price. Please cross check the product carefully while shopping online, else goat scrapers are ready to tackle your questions and disappoint u with an unsatisfactory reply.

I placed an order on Blinkit and completed the payment based on the delivery time shown before checkout. However, immediately after payment, the estimated delivery time kept increasing. An order that was promised in 9 minutes was delivered after almost 30 minutes. This is misleading for customers. Please look into this issue and ensure accurate delivery timelines are displayed."

I appreciate that Blinkit delivers items fast. I'm not happy with the customer service. Blinkit allows me to order through the web without the need for me to download the app, but doesn't give me the option to upload an image through the web, for which I have to download the app. Customer care staff can be replaced with chat bots as they are just repeating to download an app. I have suggested returning the item or sharing the image via email, but it was not accepted as an option.

Extremely disappointed product and the overall experience. The product page is completely misleading and feels like false advertising. The listings are deceptive and gives customers the wrong impression of what they are actually purchasing. customer support was useless — no proper help or accountability, and not even an attempt to resolve the issue. This honestly feels fraudulent. Buyers should be careful before purchasing, because what you receive will be completely different from description.

The cash on delivery is pathetic . No one brings change. Delivery partner doesn't return the money and always refuses coins if you give them insisting on online payment. Even after several complains to the company the problem still remains. also they are purposely sending 1 orders via several delivery person and then they are charging you handling charges for each. I ordered a fevicol along with several other things however the fevicol was delivered separately n charged 12 rs for each order

I am extremely disappointed with the blinkit customer service. My refund has been pending for almost one month now, despite multiple follow-ups with support. I made a return of a product because the way it came was very unhygienic. I raised an issue regarding the refund also but they would say to 'wait for 24-48 hrs', for straight 5 times, promising to make a refund which they did not. It is very frustrating and time-consuming customers should not wait this long for their money to be returned.

Very poor experience. I bought a charger that stopped working and does not charge properly. I raised a complaint, but the company completely ignored my issue. The product quality is disappointing, and customer support is unresponsive. I would not recommend buying from them unless they improve their after-sales service.

Once you tip the Service / Delivery Agent. It becomes default. The app doesn't have the option or link to modify the same in next order . Once you tip , that becomes the default in every next order . Even if the agent is rude or rough. Blinkit will take your tip in the Blink of the key 🔑 And your chat agent one of the worst no options to raise the concerns. In short a big scam 😒 Provide service and give options for the customer to raise their concern. DON'T STEAL PEOPLE'S MONEY

Blinkit has made grocery shopping incredibly convenient. The app is easy to use, offers a wide range of products, and delivers orders very quickly. Most of my orders arrive within minutes, and the items are usually fresh and well-packed. The delivery partners are polite, and the real-time tracking feature is helpful. While some products can occasionally be out of stock, the overall experience is excellent. Highly recommended for anyone looking for fast and reliable grocery delivery

Very disappointed with Blinkit. The store is only around 1 km away from my location, yet I was charged ₹30 delivery fees along with handling charges and small cart fees. These extra charges make the total much more expensive than expected.On top of that, Cash on Delivery is not available for orders below ₹50. Sometimes online payments do not work, and customers should still have the option to place small COD orders. Charging so many fees for nearby deliveries feels unfair and inconvenient.

Very very poor I wanted to order a horror book and a 2 bags of chips but there was no cash on delivery! Blinkit disappointed me many times as it only comes in payment on card etc 😶 also when I wanted to order a lip balm worth 133 they charged me 178 for it but I wanted to look for more things when I came to order back they increased the pricing to 206 I was like what ? I didn't add any items and they increased the payment blinkit it doing well but they need to do better

Blink it is losing its efficiency with product management. In 4 out of my last 10 orders, due to one or the other reason, i didnt get the product i ordered. Either it is damaged or out of stock. They simply asked to return the product and provided refund. Wasting the time in this process.

missing order cancel option, i forgot to change my location, and there's no option for cancellation, you must have to highlight that location bar 😕. i saved my other location just before, but because of default location, the order placed on my home location 😔. can you please do something that every person who order will ask for the multiple location they saved. so they'll not face kinda problem like me. im giving you five

My experience is so worst because when I am trying to place one order then blinkit showing option for payment and I am see that's every payment option is not available but some options available like blinkit wallet and net banking these options also not working properly so that's why I am very frustrated. I am requesting to blinkit fixed that problem for better results.

Takes longer time than other apps, almost all the products quality is really bad, they even deliver expire items at times and just refund the money when we raise an complaint. The partner never arrives at the right location. discovered a new issue now, they don't refund the money and claim they have already initiated the refund while there is no money back into the account!!

Very nice app Food, electronics, and things come on the time as shown in the app. The employers are good and respectful. They work during the day as well as at night. They just complete our wishes to buy things from the blinkit app. Such a good app I have ever seen. I literally love this app. And I will be a regular customer of this app. Thanks blinkit app
